header.description: Handle events and perform actions on your n8n instance

generate.description: Generate a security audit for this n8n instance

categories.description: Risk categories to include in the audit

daysAbandonedWorkflow.description: Days for a workflow to be considered abandoned if not executed

credentialTypeName.description: The available types depend on nodes installed on the n8n instance. Some built-in types include e.g. 'githubApi', 'notionApi', and 'slackApi'.

data.description: A valid JSON object with properties required for this Credential Type. To see the expected format, you can use 'Get Schema' operation.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

workflowId.description: Workflow to filter the executions by

status.description: Status to filter the executions by

tags.description: Include only workflows with these tags

excludePinnedData.description: Whether to exclude pinned data from the response

activeWorkflows.description: Whether to include the detailed execution data

workflowId.description: Workflow to filter the executions by

versionId.description: The version ID of the workflow to publish

workflowObject.description: A valid JSON object with required fields: 'name', 'nodes', 'connections' and 'settings'. More information can be found in the documentation.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
